description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Java (51%), with time also in Other (29%) and Markdown (17%). There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
